profile.name: David Drake
profile.bio: Engineering leader · Narrative compression researcher · Author of I Will Not Drink With You Today · Theatre → CS → the space between

repos.name: data.gov
repos.description: Data.gov source code and issue tracker

repos.name: hots-cheat-sheet
repos.description: Heroes of the Storm Cheat Sheet extracts all of the Heroes of the Storm builds from Icy Veins and puts them into CSV to create a cheat sheet.

repos.name: human-headers
repos.description: Human Headers is a project to let developers put a little more of themselves into their work without visibly impacting the web.

repos.name: intro.js
repos.description: A better way for new feature introduction and step-by-step users guide for your website and project.

repos.name: jenks
repos.description: PHP Implementation of Jenks Natural Breaks Optimization for Choropleth Mapping

repos.name: journal-down
repos.description: Journal in Markdown, using MacDown, backed up to your iCloud.

repos.name: nasa-apod-desktop
repos.description: Automatically downloads and sets the NASA picture of the day (APOD) as your desktop in Ubuntu.

repos.name: react-flow-org-chart
repos.description: Proof of concept of an org chart generator using React Flow.

repos.name: swagger-ui
repos.description: Swagger UI is a collection of HTML, Javascript, and CSS assets that dynamically generate beautiful documentation from a Swagger-compliant API.

repos.name: Third-Party
repos.description: Third Party is an open source app to easily create accountability for yourself or others.

commits.message: Strip animations from card emojis, remove sparkle trails
commits.full_message:
Strip animations from card emojis, remove sparkle trails

Just plain emojis now — no floating animation, no sparkle particles,
no robot body. Clean and simple.

commits.message: Replace robot characters with simple repo/author emojis
commits.full_message:
Replace robot characters with simple repo/author emojis

Removed the robot-body/eyes/antenna CSS. Each card now shows a
single floating emoji — repo-specific (🌐 site, 📊 dashboard,
🎮 hots, 🌿 marijuana, etc.) with author-type fallbacks
(🤖 Claude, 👨‍💻 David, ⚙️ bot).

commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: Show full dates instead of ugly relative months/years
commits.full_message:
Show full dates instead of ugly relative months/years

Anything older than 7 days now shows 'Feb 28, 2026' style dates
instead of '97mo ago'. Recent stuff still shows m/h/d ago.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: Move easter egg to top of lane (scroll up to find it)
commits.full_message:
Move easter egg to top of lane (scroll up to find it)

The egg was at the bottom where auto-scroll starts, making it
immediately visible. Now it's at the top — you have to scroll
through all commits to discover it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: Better Claude detection, repo robots, LOC counter, timeAgo fix, easter egg fix
commits.full_message:
Better Claude detection, repo robots, LOC counter, timeAgo fix, easter egg fix

- Improved isClaudeCommit: detects em dashes, bullet-point bodies,
  and emoji-heavy subjects as Claude-authored
- Each repo gets a unique robot character (hat + face emoji)
- Added Lines of Code stat card (estimated from language bytes)
- Fixed timeAgo: "106mo ago" now shows "8y 10mo ago", added weeks
- Easter egg moved inside robot-lane so it's actually scrollable
- countUp auto-scales duration for big numbers (dramatic LOC count)
- fetch-data.js now computes total_code_bytes in stats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: Update Claude model names to current versions
commits.full_message:
Update Claude model names to current versions

Opus 4 → Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4 → Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 3.5 → Haiku 4.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: Make workshop scrollable with easter egg at the bottom
commits.full_message:
Make workshop scrollable with easter egg at the bottom

- Replaced CSS transform animation with native scrollable container
  and JS-driven auto-scroll (0.6px/frame, smooth)
- User can now scroll manually (wheel/touch) through all commits
- Auto-scroll pauses on hover, resumes on mouse leave
- Thin orange scrollbar styling
- Top/bottom sticky fade gradients
- Easter egg at the very end: a wobbling egg emoji that cracks open
  on click to reveal a secret message about the human+AI collab
  with a Substack CTA

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: 🧬🌿🏳️‍🌈 phytocannabinoid synthesis chart is now a FEATURED section — full width, full glory!! 🔬✨🏳️‍⚧️
commits.full_message:
🧬🌿🏳️‍🌈 phytocannabinoid synthesis chart is now a FEATURED section — full width, full glory!! 🔬✨🏳️‍⚧️

gave the cannabinoid synthesis chart its own dedicated section with a
🧬 header, a descriptive intro paragraph, and the full-width chart
image displayed right there in the README for everyone to see!! no more
hiding behind a text link — this pioneering work deserves to be SEEN.
also cleaned up the intro paragraph to keep the bold text mention
without the old link since the chart now speaks for itself below. 💜🌿

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: ✍️🔥🏳️‍🌈 substack is the STAR now — big subscribe badge, top billing, the works!! 📬✨🏳️‍⚧️
commits.full_message:
✍️🔥🏳️‍🌈 substack is the STAR now — big subscribe badge, top billing, the works!! 📬✨🏳️‍⚧️

substack is the money maker so let's give it the spotlight it deserves!!
added a big bold orange "Subscribe on Substack" badge right below the
header (downloaded locally, no hotlinking!!), moved substack to first
position in the links bar, bolded it in the "what i'm up to" section
with an inline subscribe link. substack is front and center everywhere
now. 💜🧡

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: 🚫🔗✨🏳️‍🌈 no hotlinking!! downloaded phytocannabinoid chart locally — assets belong in the repo!! 🧬🌿🏳️‍⚧️
commits.full_message:
🚫🔗✨🏳️‍🌈 no hotlinking!! downloaded phytocannabinoid chart locally — assets belong in the repo!! 🧬🌿🏳️‍⚧️

replaced the external LinkedIn hotlink with a proper local asset
reference. downloaded the phytocannabinoid synthesis chart image into
assets/ and updated the README link accordingly. hotlinking is a
no-go — we keep our own copies around here!! 💜

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: 🧬✨🏳️‍🌈 added phytocannabinoid synthesis pioneer cred — first to chart the whole process!! 🌿🔬✨🏳️‍⚧️
commits.full_message:
🧬✨🏳️‍🌈 added phytocannabinoid synthesis pioneer cred — first to chart the whole process!! 🌿🔬✨🏳️‍⚧️

because being the FIRST to map the complete phytocannabinoid synthesis
pathway is absolutely something that belongs on the profile!! added it
to the intro paragraph with a link to the chart AND as a bullet in the
fun facts section. science queen energy!! 🧪💜

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: 🌌✨🏳️‍🌈 the space between — full profile README with real-deal Hubble imagery!! 🏳️‍⚧️✨🔭
commits.full_message:
🌌✨🏳️‍🌈 the space between — full profile README with real-deal Hubble imagery!! 🏳️‍⚧️✨🔭

swapped out the AI-generated dragon banner for an actual NASA Hubble Space
Telescope photo from Unsplash — because why use fake cosmos when the real
universe is RIGHT THERE being gorgeous?? 💜💙🩷

built out the whole profile README with:
  ✨ intro that captures the theatre→CS→AI arc
  📖 the book, the writing, the whole story
  🔭 what's current (narrative compression! AI! substack!)
  ⭐ notable open source (nasa-apod-desktop still slapping at 151 stars)
  🧰 tech stack
  🌲 personal flavor (commodore 64 tattoo!! oregon forever!!)
  🔗 all the socials and links

this is a human being's profile, not a template. it breathes. 🫁🌈

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: David Drake

commits.message: 🌈✨🏳️‍🌈 the Big Bang — summoning this repo into existence!! 🏳️‍⚧️✨🌈
commits.full_message:
🌈✨🏳️‍🌈 the Big Bang — summoning this repo into existence!! 🏳️‍⚧️✨🌈

🎉 created README.md because every beautiful chaotic journey needs a starting point
🧠 hyperfocused energy channeled into manifesting this git repo from the void
💖 sending queer joy into the commit history from the very first line
🦄 let the neurodivergent magic BEGIN

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
